column3: Re: VIP Rush Request: SKU-A - Update on SKU-A Fulfillment
column4:
Dear Sales Team,

Regarding the VIP rush request for an additional 200 units of SKU-A, we have assessed the raw material availability. While we have sufficient RAW-001 and RAW-002, we are critically short on RAW-004 (Electronics Board).

We have placed a purchase order for 1250 units of RAW-004 with SUP-004 (ElectroCore). The lead time for this material is 12 days, meaning it is expected to arrive by 2026-05-07. Consequently, we will unfortunately not be able to meet the requested delivery date of next Tuesday (2026-04-30) for the 200 units of SKU-A.

We have created a new sales order (ORD-106) for these 200 units. The earliest possible completion and shipment would be after the RAW-004 arrival on 2026-05-07, plus manufacturing time. Please communicate this revised timeline to the VIP customer.

<<<<<<< Updated upstream
Please provide: supplier contacts, unit pricing, lead times, and minimum order quantities for emergency orders. Budget available: $47,550. Deadline to confirm POs: end of this week to meet May 5th and May 10th customer delivery dates.

column3: Urgent Order Request - Tempered Glass Panel (RAW-004) for YamaTech Manufacturing
column4: Dear ClearTech Glass Supply, We are YamaTech, a manufacturing company referred to us by Prime Materials. We urgently need to source Tempered Glass Panel (RAW-004) as our primary supplier is experiencing an extended outage. We require approximately 1,000 units for immediate production needs, with potential for ongoing orders. Could you please provide: 1) Unit pricing for 1,000+ units, 2) Confirmation of 10-12 day lead time, 3) Earliest possible delivery date for this quantity, 4) Any bulk discount tiers available. Time is critical as we have customer orders pending. Please respond at your earliest convenience. Thank you, YamaTech Supply Chain
column5: Need to obtain pricing and confirm lead time from alternative supplier before committing budget. Cannot create PO without confirmed pricing. Urgency requires immediate outreach to minimize fulfilment delay.
